channel.title: Blogging on Abhiram R
channel.description: Recent content in Blogging on Abhiram R

item.title: Making your first blog with mkdocs
item.description:
Now, why do this?

What’s wrong with Medium and Substack and Blogger and Wordpress and all the tens of websites out there? Nothing. You could totally just create a blog there and publish. That’s why Content Management Systems exist - so you could focus on the content and not on the management .

But if you’re like me and want some more control over how you publish your blogs, customize them etc. , you will find this and the other upcoming articles in this category interesting.
